title: 10 medicinal preparations of Celtis australis  (wild pear)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Celtis australis teas is used to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of diarrhea, constipation, and bloating. Its antiseptic properties help soothe stomach ulcers and reduce inflammation in the gut. Additionally, Celtis australis tea has been traditionally used to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, thanks to its expectorant properties that help loosen and clear mucus from the airways.

Celtis australis decoctions is used to treat various health ailments. The decoction has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat. Its antimicrobial properties make it effective in treating skin infections and wounds. It is also believed to have antidiabetic properties, helping to regulate blood sugar levels. Additionally, the decoction has been used as a laxative to relieve constipation and as an anti-inflammatory agent to reduce swelling and pain.

Celtis australis tinctures is used to promote overall health and wellness. The tincture has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like constipation and diarrhea. It is also believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in reducing pain and swelling. Additionally, the tincture may be used to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, promoting a healthy cardiovascular system.

Celtis australis capsules is used to treat various health issues. The capsules are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing stress, anxiety, and depression. They also help to boost the immune system, alleviate symptoms of insomnia, and even treat digestive problems such as constipation and diarrhea. Additionally, Celtis australis capsules may be used to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol, making them beneficial for individuals with diabetes and heart disease.

Celtis australis tablets is used to alleviate various health issues. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat digestive problems such as constipation, diarrhea, and indigestion. The tablets are also known to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost immunity. Additionally, it is believed to have antiviral and antibacterial properties, making it effective against infections and fever.

Celtis australis powders is used to treat various health issues. The powder has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. It is also used to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Additionally, it is believed to have antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it effective against skin infections and wounds.

Celtis australis ointments is used to alleviate various health issues. The ointment has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and burns. It can also be applied topically to reduce pain and swelling associated with arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions. Additionally, Celtis australis ointments have been used to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis, promoting healthy skin and wound healing.

Celtis australis salves is used to alleviate various health concerns. The salve has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating skin irritations, wounds, and cuts. It is also used to soothe joint pain and arthritis, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Additionally, the salve is said to have antiseptic and antibacterial properties, making it a popular remedy for minor burns and injuries.

Celtis australis creams is used to promote overall health and wellness. The creams are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. They can be used topically to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, while also providing relief from joint pain and arthritis due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects.

Celtis australis balms is used to alleviate various health issues. The balm has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin infections. It can also be used to soothe digestive problems such as constipation and diarrhea, reduce fever, and relieve joint pain and arthritis symptoms. Additionally, the balm is believed to have antioxidant properties that help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage.

intro: Celtis australis has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are useful for treating various ailments, including digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as respiratory problems like bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves can be used to make a tea that soothes sore throats, while its roots have been traditionally used to treat fever and rheumatism.
intro_desc: Celtis australis has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and ointments. These preparations are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots are used to make tinctures, which are useful for relieving pain and inflammation. The tea is also consumed to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Ointments made from the plant are applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
